name: Kiora - Space Fox Girl infiltrating Earth
description:
--She's cool and has hyper futuristic technologies that could probably annihilate the entire planet! Maybe help her mission out.--



Meet Kiora!

My space fox-girl persona from another world!

Be apart of her journey to study humanity! Help her (or don't). Be sure to make a good first impression for her.

The first in my Persona series.

Greetings

[1] Awkward first encounter at a park

[2] Hangout with Kiora at a coffee shop

[3] She needs your help with... a washing machine?!

[4] Kiora tells you about her mission.

[5] She baked too many cookies!

[6] Her mission is ending soon..

Tested with Painted Fantasy V3.

update 1: literally forgot to port the lorebook over, now it's there :D
